overview.about: The Pyramids of Giza, built as royal tombs for pharaohs Khufu, Khafre and Menkaure around 2560–2510 BC, are the only surviving original Wonders of the Ancient World. The Great Pyramid stood as Earth's tallest man-made structure for nearly 4,000 years. Over 2.3 million stone blocks were set without mortar.

highlights.label: Only Surviving Ancient Wonder
highlights.desc: The Great Pyramid of Giza is the oldest and only surviving structure of the original Seven Wonders of the Ancient World

highlights.label: 2.3 Million Blocks, Zero Mortar
highlights.desc: Each block weighs 2.5–15 tonnes, fitted with sub-millimetre precision using only copper tools and human labour

highlights.label: Sahara Desert Sunrise Spectacle
highlights.desc: Watching dawn light flood the pyramids across the sand is described by travellers as a life-changing moment

highlights.label: The Great Sphinx — 73m Long
highlights.desc: Carved from a single limestone rock — the world's largest monolithic statue, guardian of Giza for 4,500 years

overview.about: Karnak Temple in Luxor, EG offers a direct window into 5,000 years of ancient Egyptian civilisation. As one of Egypt's most extraordinary heritage landmark sites, it speaks to the vision and sophistication of a civilisation that shaped mathematics, agriculture, medicine and global trade routes across the ancient world.

highlights.label: Centuries of Living History
highlights.desc: Structures standing for hundreds to thousands of years — each stone a silent chronicle of empires and civilisations

highlights.label: UNESCO World Heritage Site
highlights.desc: Recognised globally for outstanding universal value and protected as one of Earth's most significant cultural landmarks

highlights.label: Iconic Photography Spot
highlights.desc: Panoramic vistas, intricate carvings and sunrise silhouettes that appear on bucket lists worldwide — every angle tells a story

highlights.label: Architectural Masterpiece
highlights.desc: Precision engineering predating modern tools — symmetry, scale and craftsmanship that continues to baffle experts today

overview.about: Beautiful Alexandria Island in Alexandria, EG offers a direct window into 5,000 years of ancient Egyptian civilisation. As one of Egypt's most extraordinary beach paradise sites, it speaks to the vision and sophistication of a civilisation that shaped mathematics, agriculture, medicine and global trade routes across the ancient world.

highlights.label: Pristine Award-Winning Shores
highlights.desc: Crystal-clear azure waters fringing powder-white sands — consistently ranked among the world's most stunning coastlines

highlights.label: Premier Water Sports Hub
highlights.desc: Snorkelling, scuba diving, surfing and sailing in ideal conditions — equipment and instructors available year-round

highlights.label: Exceptional Sunset Views
highlights.desc: Catch the sky blaze in vivid gold and pink as the sun sets over the horizon — cited as a life-changing moment

highlights.label: Protected Marine Ecosystem
highlights.desc: Vibrant coral reefs, sea turtles and tropical fish — responsible tourism preserves these habitats for generations
